title: Argentina v Algeria | World Cup | Match preview
original_text:
Reigning champions Argentina kick off their campaign by taking on African side Algeria in Group J clash at Kansas City Stadium.
Argentina v AlgeriaArgentina v Algeria
Group JGroup J
Tuesday, 16 June | Kansas City Stadium
Kick-off timeKick-off time
20:00 (Kansas City) | 22:00 (Buenos Aires) | Algiers (02:00 on Wednesday, 17 June)
The matchThe match
The eyes of the world will be on Argentina as they kick off their title defence in Kansas City. Algeria eased through African qualifying and can still call upon veteran playmaker Riyad Mahrez. Can they cause an almighty upset in their first-ever World Cup meeting with Argentina? Or will Lionel Messi and Co lay down a title marker?

Host City: Kansas CityHost City: Kansas City
A taste of what’s to come from this FIFA World Cup 26™ Host City.A taste of what’s to come from this FIFA World Cup 26™ Host City.
Kansas City Stadium is certified by Guinness World Records as the loudest outdoor sports venue in the world and has hosted a record five consecutive NFL Conference Championships.
The arena, which is the home of the NFL Kansas City Chiefs, reached a record-breaking decibel level of 142.2 when the Chiefs took on the New England Patriots in 2014.
Known as the soccer capital of America, Kansas City is home to two-time MLS champions Sporting KC and 2022 National Women's Soccer League (NWSL) finalists KC Current and is a bi-state metropolitan area that straddles the state line between Missouri and Kansas.
